CustomField.formula:
IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'InProgress'),
IMAGE ( "/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=01590000001nPKb&oid=00D90000000chuS","Booked"),
IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'submitted'),
IMAGE ( "/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=01590000001nPKb&oid=00D90000000chuS","Submitted"),
IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'booked'),
IMAGE ( "/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=01590000001nPKc&oid=00D90000000chuS","Booked"),
IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'complete'),
IMAGE ( "/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=01590000001nPKd&oid=00D90000000chuS","Complete"),
IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'expired'),
IMAGE ( "/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=01590000001nPKe&oid=00D90000000chuS","Expired"),
IMAGE ( "/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=01590000001nPKf&oid=00D90000000chuS","Incomplete"))))))
CustomField.label: Progress
